recommendations.title: The Science of Sleep
recommendations.overview: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is lovestruck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

recommendations.title: Microbe and Gasoline
recommendations.overview: Two young friends embark on a road trip across France in a vehicle they built themselves.

recommendations.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
recommendations.overview: Joel Barish, heartbroken that his girlfriend underwent a procedure to erase him from her memory, decides to do the same. However, as he watches his memories of her fade away, he realises that he still loves her, and may be too late to correct his mis

recommendations.title: Mood Indigo
recommendations.overview: A woman suffers from an unusual illness caused by a flower growing in her lungs.

recommendations.title: Be Kind Rewind
recommendations.overview: A man whose brain becomes magnetized unintentionally destroys every tape in his friend's video store. In order to satisfy the store's most loyal renter, an aging woman with signs of dementia, the two men set out to remake the lost films.

recommendations.title: Dave Chappelle's Block Party
recommendations.overview: The American comedian/actor delivers a story about the alternative Hip Hop scene. A small town Ohio mans moves to Brooklyn, New York, to throw an unprecedented block party.

recommendations.title: Tokyo!

recommendations.director: Leos Carax, Bong Joon Ho, Michel Gondry

recommendations.title: Lila Says

recommendations.title: The Green Hornet
